## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss CMS walkthrough and content strategy for hyperexponential's website with GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HyperX is transitioning from Storyblock to Framer CMS in 2-3 months; GrowthX to publish on Storyblock meanwhile](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on editorial blog content for both US and UK markets, with underwriting as a key topic gap to address](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Current blog setup requires manual publishing for US/UK; new Framer system will automate regional content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [GrowthX to present initial content clusters to David on Wednesday, seeking feedback from Franki as well](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Strategy Sprint Overview

  - [8-week engagement to create "artifacts" for content generation:](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
      - [Audience personas (e.g., actuaries, chief underwriters, CIOs)](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Company context descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [Writing guidelines for HyperX voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Aim to publish first content piece by week 4-5 (currently in week 2)](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Will generate 4 top-level content clusters for review](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Current CMS Setup (Storyblock)

  - [Separate UK and US blog folders requiring manual dual publishing](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Standard blog post template includes:](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Header banner with title, reading time, tags, publication date](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Pre-designed abstract thumbnails for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Description field and main content area with formatting options](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Author information added via schema tab (some fields non-functional)](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [SEO tab for meta title and description](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Category tags available but underutilized (can be updated)](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Upcoming CMS Transition (Framer)

  - [Moving to Framer by year-end for website and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Will enable automated US/UK content distribution with localization](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Single publishing process with regional versioning](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Focus on editorial blog content initially](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop new blog images and in-copy imagery](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust category tags to align with new content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Underwriting identified as a major content gap to address](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Franki to provide examples of inspirational underwriting content](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to present initial 4 content clusters to David on Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Share content cluster proposals with Franki for additional feedback](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Franki to email examples of quality underwriting content for reference](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content creation, publishing on both US and UK Storyblock blogs](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Consider developing new blog images and in-copy visuals to enhance content](https://fathom.video/share/prgWDHRCnGU7b9H_jn7PkvTHLjsv9yqx?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
